raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Farmworker COVID-19 Relief Package includes measures to protect farmworkers from contracting COVID-19 while harvesting food.",
    "Farmworkers often live in crowded households and work in close proximity to each other, increasing their risk of COVID-19 exposure.",
    "Many farmworkers lack reliable access to quality health care, heightening their vulnerability to COVID-19.",
    "The relief package mandates safer working conditions for California farmworkers, including sanitation practices and personal protective equipment.",
    "The package expands access to telehealth services for rural and community health centers.",
    "The package includes a budget request of $25 million for temporary housing for agricultural workers to self-isolate if they have been exposed to COVID-19.",
    "Agricultural workers make up a disproportionate percentage of new COVID-19 cases in California."
  ]
}
```
